items.title: [正面] É um jogo de cartas muito bom, não tão bom no ques...
items.summary: É um jogo de cartas muito bom, não tão bom no quesito de ser acessível para free to plays como limbus company mas eu consegui um monte de coisa sem pagar e existem muitos métodos para conseguir recursos sem pagar. A estética e a história são muito boas e a gameplay é divertida

items.title: [正面] Since the release of StS back in 2019, rouge-like...
items.summary:
Since the release of StS back in 2019, rouge-like deckbuilding genre has becoming my newfound obsession of gaming. Each of every single rouge-like deckbuilding out there has their own unique twist with the way they presented the gameplay n the mechanics. Among all of them, with Confident i have to say that Morimens manage to scratch that itch within me after so many years. And lemme tell you.... this game is gonna make you play up to 30+ cards in a single turn after reshuffling your deck twice , surviving fatal attack after triggering 25% death resistance, getting clogged with 10 different status effect cards that inflict different types of ligma n cancer, nuking the boss in a single turn after setting up all the big Exalt n stacking buff after seeing the boss about to one shot u, getting bodied by some random mobs encounter cause u didnt draw your shield/str drain cards..... the list goes on.

Try it , see if u like. dont let it bother u coz its gacha.

items.title: [负面] Another Slay the spire with lots of story and cine...
items.summary: Another Slay the spire with lots of story and cinematic effects that we did not ask. I need 10-15 second to play a card before it finishes all the animations, and same animation for that card again.
